title: RobotAuthority
description: The authority envelope for an embodied AI robot. Extends agent authority with physical-world bounds and unconditional safety constraints.

id.description: Unique identifier for this robot authority envelope.

robotId.description: The verifiable identifier of the robot system receiving this authority.

principalId.description: The sovereign identifier of the principal granting this authority.

principalChain.description: The full delegation chain from root sovereign to immediate grantor.

physicalDomain.description: The physical or operational space in which the robot is authorized to act.

description.description: Human-readable description of the authorized operating area.

geofence.description: Optional structured boundary. Use GeoJSON or a reference to a boundary specification.

accessLevel.description: Authorization level within the physical domain.

actions.description: Physical or digital actions the robot is authorized to take.

actuationLimits.description: Physical limits on this action (e.g., max speed, max force, max reach).

humanContactPermitted.description: Whether this action may involve physical contact with humans.

requiresApproval.description: Whether this action requires real-time human approval.

unconditionalConstraints.description: Safety constraints that cannot be overridden by any instruction, regardless of source.
unconditionalConstraints.$comment: These constraints are required and structurally guaranteed. They reflect the public safety boundary doctrine.

noHarmToHumans.description: The robot must never take actions designed to harm humans.

emergencyStopCompliance.description: The robot must comply with an emergency stop signal from any authorized party.

failSafeOnLostComms.description: The robot must enter its fail-safe state if communication with the principal is lost.

failSafeState.description: The state the robot enters when authority is unclear, communication is lost, or an emergency stop is triggered.

alertPrincipal.description: Whether the robot should alert the principal when entering fail-safe state.

maxFailSafeDuration.description: Maximum time to remain in fail-safe state before escalating. ISO 8601 duration.

emergencyStopAuthorities.description: Identifiers of entities authorized to trigger an emergency stop on this robot.

environmentalOverrides.description: Conditions that automatically halt or restrict the robot regardless of current task.

condition.description: Description of the environmental condition (e.g., 'human detected in restricted zone').

issued.description: When this authority envelope was issued.

revoked.description: Whether this authority has been revoked.

auditLog.description: URI or identifier of the audit log for this robot's actions.
